sbts.name: Discord Server Booster
sbts.description: Awarded to users who support the Renaiss Discord by boosting server performance, recognizing direct contributions to community infrastructure.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章授予通过提升服务器性能来支持 Renaiss Discord 的用户，表彰对社区基础设施的直接贡献。
sbts.howToGet: Boost the Renaiss Discord server at least once
sbts.howToGetZh: 至少提升一次 Renaiss Discord 服务器的优先级

sbts.name: Community Developer
sbts.description: Awarded to developers who build applications, tools, or AI systems for Renaiss, verified by the Renaiss team.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此奖授予为 Renaiss 构建应用程序、工具或 AI 系统的开发者，经 Renaiss 团队验证。
sbts.howToGet: Develop and submit applications, tools, or AI systems supporting Renaiss
sbts.howToGetZh: 开发并提交支持 Renaiss 的应用程序、工具或 AI 系统

sbts.name: Community Voice
sbts.description: Rewarded to those who spread knowledge, create content, and actively participate in discussions on X + Discord.
sbts.descriptionZh: 奖励给在 X + Discord 上传播知识、创作内容并积极参与讨论的人。
sbts.howToGet: Post 8 high-quality Renaiss-related tweets within one month of joining DC
sbts.howToGetZh: 加入 DC 一个月内发布8篇 Renaiss 相关的高质量推文

sbts.name: S+ Breaker
sbts.description: Awarded to collectors who successfully pull a top-tier S-grade card on the Renaiss platform.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章颁发给在 Renaiss 平台成功抽取到顶级 S 级卡牌的收藏家。
sbts.howToGet: Pull at least one top-tier or S-grade card from any eligible pack
sbts.howToGetZh: 在 Renaiss 上从任何符合条件的卡包中至少抽取一张 S 级卡牌

sbts.name: Discord Linker
sbts.description: Rewarded to users who link their Discord account, enabling deeper community engagement.
sbts.descriptionZh: 奖励给连接 Discord 账号的用户，从而实现更深入的社区参与。
sbts.howToGet: Link your Discord account
sbts.howToGetZh: 链接 Discord 账号

sbts.name: Fund Your Account
sbts.description: Rewarded to users who make their first deposit and begin fully participating in the Renaiss ecosystem.
sbts.descriptionZh: 奖励给首次充值并开始全面参与 Renaiss 生态系统的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Complete a single deposit of 60 USDT or more within the past 3 days
sbts.howToGetZh: 在过去 3 天内完成单笔 60USDT 或以上的存款

sbts.name: Pack Opener
sbts.description: Rewarded to users who consistently participate in pack opening, discovering new cards and driving ecosystem growth.
sbts.descriptionZh: 奖励给持续参与开包、发现新卡牌并推动生态系统发展的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Open 5 packs
sbts.howToGetZh: 执行 5 次包装开封

sbts.name: Signal Booster
sbts.description: Awarded to community members whose comments powerfully support and amplify the founder's voice.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章授予那些评论有力地支持并强化了创始人声音的社区成员。
sbts.howToGet: Actively engage with official & founder tweets, post outstanding comments
sbts.howToGetZh: 积极与官网&创始人推文互动，发表杰出评论，有几率获得

sbts.name: The Recruiter
sbts.description: Rewarded to users who help expand the Renaiss community by recruiting new players.
sbts.descriptionZh: 奖励给通过招募新玩家帮助扩大 Renaiss 社区的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Successfully invite 5 or more new users
sbts.howToGetZh: 成功邀请 5 位或更多新用户

sbts.name: The Trader
sbts.description: Awarded to users who actively contribute to market liquidity through consistent trading.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此奖项颁发给积极通过持续交易为市场流动性做出贡献的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Complete 3 or more valid trades
sbts.howToGetZh: 完成3笔或以上有效交易

sbts.name: X Linker
sbts.description: Rewarded to users who link their Twitter account, enabling future reputation tiers.
sbts.descriptionZh: 奖励给关联其 Twitter 帐户的用户，以便启用未来的声誉层级。
sbts.howToGet: Link your Twitter/X account
sbts.howToGetZh: 链接推特账号

sbts.name: Grand Ripper
sbts.description: Awarded to users who demonstrate the highest enthusiasm for pack opening — 200+ packs opened.
sbts.descriptionZh: 授予那些在拆封方面表现出最高热情的用户——完成200次或以上的包装开箱。
sbts.howToGet: Complete 200 or more pack openings
sbts.howToGetZh: 完成200次或以上的包装开箱

sbts.name: The Vanguard
sbts.description: Awarded to senior and influential brand ambassadors who have had a profound impact since Renaiss inception.
sbts.descriptionZh: 该奖项授予自 Renaiss 生态系统创立之初就对其产生深远影响的资深且具影响力的品牌大使。
sbts.howToGet: Early supporters demonstrating the highest influence, joining as Renaiss ambassadors
sbts.howToGetZh: 早期支持者表现出最高的影响力，加入 Renaiss 大使

sbts.name: New Year Limited SBT
sbts.description: New Year event limited SBT. Unlock for 5 consecutive days to get the hidden God of Fortune SBT.
sbts.descriptionZh: 新年活动限定 SBT，连续解锁5天可获得隐藏财神爷 SBT。
sbts.howToGet: Participate in official events, unlock SBTs for 5 consecutive days
sbts.howToGetZh: 参与官推发布的活动，连续解锁5天sbt即可解锁隐藏财神爷sbt

sbts.name: God of Fortune
sbts.description: Hidden SBT unlocked after completing 5 consecutive days of the New Year event. The ultimate New Year reward.
sbts.descriptionZh: 完成新年活动连续5天解锁后获得的隐藏 SBT，新年活动的终极奖励。
sbts.howToGet: Complete all 5 days of the New Year SBT event consecutively
sbts.howToGetZh: 连续完成新年 SBT 活动的全部5天

sbts.name: Hong Kong Explorer SBT
sbts.description: Awarded to users who met the Renaiss CEO during Consensus Hong Kong.
sbts.descriptionZh: 在 Consensus Hong Kong 期间捕捉到 Renaiss CEO 的用户获得。
sbts.howToGet: Meet the Renaiss CEO during Consensus Hong Kong
sbts.howToGetZh: 在 Consensus Hong Kong 期间捕捉到 Renaiss CEO

sbts.name: Infinite Flash Mint
sbts.description: Awarded to users who entered the game within 15 minutes of the Infinite Gacha Beta launch.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章颁发给在无限扭蛋 Beta 测试上线后 15 分钟内进入游戏的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Purchase a pack within the first 15 minutes of the Infinite Gacha Beta launch
sbts.howToGetZh: 在无限扭蛋测试上线后的前 15 分钟内购买礼包

sbts.name: Infinite Grinder
sbts.description: Awarded to users who actively participated in the Infinite Gacha Beta and opened 5+ packs.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章颁发给积极参与无限扭蛋测试版并多次开启卡包的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Open at least 5 or more packs during the Infinite Gacha Beta test
sbts.howToGetZh: 在无限扭蛋测试期间开启至少 5 个或更多礼包

sbts.name: Infinite Pioneer
sbts.description: Rewarded to users who participated in the Infinite Gacha Beta and opened their first pack.
sbts.descriptionZh: 奖励给参与无限扭蛋测试版并开启首个卡包的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Open at least 1 pack during the Infinite Gacha Beta test
sbts.howToGetZh: 在无限扭蛋测试期间至少打开 1 个卡包

sbts.name: Infinite Cursed
sbts.description: Awarded to the top 5 users with the highest net loss during the Infinite Gacha Beta.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章颁发给无限扭蛋测试版期间净亏损最高的5位用户。
sbts.howToGet: Rank in the top 5 for net loss during the Infinite Gacha Beta
sbts.howToGetZh: 在无限扭蛋测试版中净亏排名前5

sbts.name: Infinite Flex
sbts.description: Awarded to users who pulled an S-grade card during the Infinite Gacha Beta and publicly showcased it.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章颁发给在无限扭蛋测试版期间抽到 S 级卡牌并公开展示的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Pull an S-grade card during the Infinite Gacha Beta and share on X
sbts.howToGetZh: 无限扭蛋测试期间抽取一张 S 级卡牌，并在 X 上分享

sbts.name: Legacy Flash Mint
sbts.description: Awarded to users who entered the game within one minute of Legacy Pack 3.0 launch.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章授予在 Legacy Pack 3.0 上线后一分钟内进入游戏的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Purchase a pack within the first minute of Legacy 3.0 pack launch
sbts.howToGetZh: 在 Legacy 3.0 礼包上线后的第一分钟内购买礼包

sbts.name: Legacy Triple Pull
sbts.description: Rewarded to users who successfully completed three qualifying draws during the Legacy 3.0 event.
sbts.descriptionZh: 奖励给在传承卡包 3.0 活动期间成功完成三次合格抽奖的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Open 3 packs in Legacy Pack 3.0
sbts.howToGetZh: 在传承卡包 3.0 中打开 3 个卡包

sbts.name: Live Participant
sbts.description: Awarded to users who attended the January 26 Renaiss Discord AMA.
sbts.descriptionZh: 授予参加 1 月 26 日 Renaiss Discord AMA 的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Attend the AMA event held on Renaiss Discord on January 26
sbts.howToGetZh: 参加 1 月 26 日在 Renaiss Discord 上举行的 AMA 活动

sbts.name: Refs SBT
sbts.description: Ecosystem collaboration SBT with Refs. Event ended February 5th.
sbts.descriptionZh: 与 Refs 的生态系统合作 SBT，活动已于2月5日结束。
sbts.howToGet: Register on Refs with your Renaiss-linked X account and follow @whatsyourrefs
sbts.howToGetZh: 用已绑定 Renaiss 的 X 账号注册 Refs 并关注 @whatsyourrefs

sbts.name: Early Bird
sbts.description: Awarded to the earliest explorers who joined Renaiss during the Alpha phase.
sbts.descriptionZh: 授予在 Alpha 阶段加入 Renaiss 的最早一批探险家。
sbts.howToGet: Log in at least once during the Alpha testing period
sbts.howToGetZh: 在 Alpha 测试期间至少登录一次

sbts.name: Beta Pioneer
sbts.description: Rewarded to users who logged in during the Renaiss closed beta testing period.
sbts.descriptionZh: 奖励给在 Renaiss 封测期间登录的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Log in once during the closed beta testing period
sbts.howToGetZh: 在封闭测试期间登录一次

sbts.name: Christmas Carol
sbts.description: Awarded to community members who actively participated in Christmas events and shared Renaiss holiday content.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章颁发给积极参与圣诞节活动、分享 Renaiss 节日内容的社区成员。
sbts.howToGet: Post at least one Renaiss-related Christmas blog post during the Christmas promotion
sbts.howToGetZh: 在圣诞节促销活动期间，至少发布一篇与 Renaiss 相关的圣诞节博文

sbts.name: Heat Survivor
sbts.description: Awarded to users who participated during the 2026 product peak period.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章颁发给在 2026 年产品高峰期参与的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Open at least 1 pack during the 2026 pack launch period
sbts.howToGetZh: 在 2026 年包装上市期间，至少打开 1 包

sbts.name: Identity Flexer
sbts.description: Awarded to users who showcase their renaiss.xyz profile through approved UGC campaigns.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章授予通过经批准的 UGC 活动展示其 renaiss.xyz 个人资料的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Participate in the 'Show Your Profile' UGC campaign following official rules
sbts.howToGetZh: 请按照官方规则参与'展示你的个人资料'UGC 活动

sbts.name: Ice Breaker
sbts.description: Awarded to collectors who braved the cold and opened ice/frozen packs.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章颁发给那些无惧严寒、坚持拆封冰冻包装的收藏家。
sbts.howToGet: Open 5 or more frozen/ice packs
sbts.howToGetZh: 打开5个或更多冷冻包装

sbts.name: New Year Opener
sbts.description: Awarded to users who opened 2026 packs, marking participation at the start of the new year.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章颁发给已开启 2026 卡包的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Complete 5 openings of 2026 packs, or achieve over $100 in market trading within first 20 hours
sbts.howToGetZh: 完成 5 次 2026 卡包的开启，或者在卡包上线后的前 20 小时内达成超过 100 美元的市场交易额

sbts.name: Sprint Challenger
sbts.description: Rewarded to users who participated in the limited-time Sprint pack event.
sbts.descriptionZh: 奖励给参与限时 Sprint 套餐活动并帮助促成售罄的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Open at least 1 Sprint pack during the Sprint event
sbts.howToGetZh: 在 Sprint 活动期间打开至少 1 个 Sprint 活动包

sbts.name: The Survivor
sbts.description: Rewarded to users active during the Pack 4.0 buyback wallet depletion — one of the most chaotic moments in Renaiss.
sbts.descriptionZh: 奖励给在 Pack 4.0 回购钱包耗尽期间活跃的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Open at least 1 pack during Pack 4.0, or complete at least 1 trade within 24 hours before the announcement
sbts.howToGetZh: 在 Pack 4.0 期间打开至少 1 个卡包，或在公告发布前 24 小时内完成至少 1 笔交易

sbts.name: Debate Explorer
sbts.description: Awarded to users who had face-to-face interactions with the Renaiss team.
sbts.descriptionZh: 与 Renaiss 团队面对面交流的用户获得此徽章。
sbts.howToGet: Meet the Renaiss team in person (Winchman 3-person meetup)
sbts.howToGetZh: 与 Renaiss 团队本人见面（Winchman 3人见面）

sbts.name: RNG Martyr
sbts.description: Awarded to users with the largest net loss from pack opening — symbolizing an exhausted RNG and indomitable spirit.
sbts.descriptionZh: 颁发给开包净亏损最大的用户——象征着精疲力竭的随机数生成器和不屈不挠的精神。
sbts.howToGet: Highest net loss from pack opening within a specific period
sbts.howToGetZh: 在特定时期内，包装开启造成的最大净损失

sbts.name: Supreme Collector
sbts.description: Awarded to the collector with the most total cards, representing unmatched ownership and collecting power.
sbts.descriptionZh: 颁发给拥有卡片总数最多的收藏家，代表着无与伦比的收藏实力。
sbts.howToGet: Rank #1 in total card holdings
sbts.howToGetZh: 持卡总量排名第一

sbts.name: Top Trader SBT - Season 1
sbts.nameZh: 顶级交易员 SBT - 第一赛季
sbts.description: Awarded to the best-performing traders in the first Renaiss Trading Arena competition.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章授予首届 Renaiss 交易锦标赛中表现最佳的交易员。
sbts.howToGet: Rank in the top 10 in Renaiss Trading Arena Season 1
sbts.howToGetZh: 在 Renaiss Trading Arena 第一赛季中排名前十

sbts.name: 2025 Year Award — Hall of Fame
sbts.description: Awarded to users who received official recognition at the Renaiss Year-End Awards Ceremony.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章颁发给在 Renaiss 年终颁奖典礼上获得官方荣誉的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Win any official award at the Renaiss Year-End Awards Ceremony
sbts.howToGetZh: 在 Renaiss 年终颁奖典礼上赢得任何官方奖项

sbts.name: 2025 Year Award — Conviction Holder
sbts.nameZh: 2025 年度奖 — 信念持有者
sbts.description: Awarded to the collector with the highest total card value, recognizing long-term conviction.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此奖项颁发给卡片总价值最高的收藏家，表彰长期信念。
sbts.howToGet: Rank in the top 3 for total card portfolio value during 2025 year-end selection
sbts.howToGetZh: 在2025年终评选期间，卡组合总价值排名前三

sbts.name: 2025 Year Award — Signal Amplifier
sbts.nameZh: 2025 年度奖 — 信号放大器
sbts.description: Awarded to the creator with the strongest content engagement and influence.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此奖项授予内容互动性和影响力最强的创作者。
sbts.howToGet: Rank #1 in overall content performance and engagement during 2025 Year-End Awards
sbts.howToGetZh: 在2025年终颁奖典礼期间，整体内容表现和互动度排名第一

sbts.name: 2025 Year Award — Core Contributor
sbts.nameZh: 2025 年度奖 — 核心贡献者
sbts.description: Awarded to the most outstanding contributor to Renaiss in 2025.
sbts.descriptionZh: 该奖项授予 Renaiss 2025 年最杰出的贡献者。
sbts.howToGet: Be selected as one of the top 3 contributors for the 2025 Renaiss Year-End Awards
sbts.howToGetZh: 入选 2025 年 Renaiss 年终奖的前三名贡献者

sbts.name: 2025 Year Award — Growth Catalyst
sbts.nameZh: 2025 年度奖 — 增长催化剂
sbts.description: Awarded to the top recruiters who most actively drove Renaiss user growth in 2025.
sbts.descriptionZh: 该奖项授予在 2025 年推动 Renaiss 用户增长最活跃的顶级招募人员。
sbts.howToGet: Rank in the top 3 for total invited users during 2025 Year-End Awards
sbts.howToGetZh: 在2025年终颁奖典礼期间，受邀用户总数排名前三

sbts.name: 2025 Year Award — Narrative Builder
sbts.nameZh: 2025 年度奖 — 叙事建设者
sbts.description: Awarded to creators who consistently produced high-quality long-form content in 2025.
sbts.descriptionZh: 授予在 2025 年持续创作高质量长篇内容的创作者。
sbts.howToGet: Rank in the top 3 for long-form content volume and quality during 2025 year-end selection
sbts.howToGetZh: 在2025年终评选期间，长篇内容产量和质量排名前三

sbts.name: 2025 Year Award — Real Grinder
sbts.nameZh: 2025 年度奖 — 真正的研磨者
sbts.description: Awarded to builders who consistently contributed to the Renaiss ecosystem throughout 2025.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此奖项授予在 2025 年期间持续为 Renaiss 生态系统做出贡献的建设者。
sbts.howToGet: Win the 2025 Renaissance Year-End 'Silent Builder Award'
sbts.howToGetZh: 获取2025年文艺复兴年终奖'无声建设者奖'

sbts.name: 2025 Year Award — Referral Force
sbts.description: Awarded to users whose invited users generated the most pack openings.
sbts.descriptionZh: 此徽章颁发给邀请用户促成最多礼包开启次数的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Rank in the top 3 for total packs opened by invited users during 2025 Year-End Awards
sbts.howToGetZh: 在2025年终颁奖典礼期间，通过受邀用户开启的礼包总数排名前三

sbts.name: 2025 Year Award — Speed of Hands
sbts.description: Awarded to the user who individually opened the most packs in 2025.
sbts.descriptionZh: 授予在 2025 年单独开启卡包数量最多的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Rank in the top 3 for total packs opened individually during 2025 Year-End Awards
sbts.howToGetZh: 在2025年终颁奖期间，个人开启的包装总数排名前三

sbts.name: 2025 Year Award — The Unluckiest
sbts.description: Awarded to the user who suffered the largest net loss due to RNG in 2025.
sbts.descriptionZh: 授予在 2025 年因 RNG 遭受最大净损失的用户。
sbts.howToGet: Highest net loss due to RNG during 2025 year-end selection
sbts.howToGetZh: 在2025年终评选期间，因RNG造成的最大净损失

sbts.name: Community Leader
sbts.description: On-chain verification of community leader role. SBT holders can represent their communities in official Renaiss initiatives.
sbts.descriptionZh: 社区领袖角色的链上验证。SBT 持有者可以在官方 Renaiss 活动中代表其社区。
sbts.howToGet: Apply through the Community Leader SBT Program and get approved
sbts.howToGetZh: 通过社区领袖 SBT 计划申请并获得批准

sbts.name: Double Giant
sbts.description: Exclusive SBT unlocked by drawing both Renacrypt Pack and Omega Pack during the dual card machine launch.
sbts.descriptionZh: 通过在双卡机上线期间同时抽取 Renacrypt Pack 和 Omega Pack 解锁的专属 SBT。
sbts.howToGet: Draw both Renacrypt Pack and Omega Pack
sbts.howToGetZh: 同时抽取 Renacrypt Pack 和 Omega Pack

sbts.name: Ambassador SBT
sbts.description: Awarded to participants in the Renaiss Ambassador 2.0 Program with a 3-tier growth structure.
sbts.descriptionZh: 授予参与 Renaiss Ambassador 2.0 计划的成员，该计划具有3级成长结构。
sbts.howToGet: Join and be selected for the Renaiss Ambassador 2.0 Program
sbts.howToGetZh: 加入并被选入 Renaiss Ambassador 2.0 计划

sbts.name: Regional Ambassador
sbts.description: Awarded to elected regional ambassadors through community voting. Each region elects two roles: Active Ambassador and Regional Ambassador.
sbts.descriptionZh: 通过社区投票选出的区域大使获得。每个区域选出两个角色：活跃大使和区域大使。
sbts.howToGet: Win the community vote for Regional Ambassador in your region
sbts.howToGetZh: 在所在区域的社区投票中赢得区域大使选举

sbts.name: Voyaga Pioneer
sbts.description: Awarded to early participants of the Voyaga Pack (One Piece IP) launch. First-ever One Piece cards on Renaiss.
sbts.descriptionZh: 授予 Voyaga Pack（海贼王 IP）上线的早期参与者。Renaiss 上首批海贼王卡牌。
sbts.howToGet: Participate in the Voyaga Pack launch and open at least 1 pack
sbts.howToGetZh: 参与 Voyaga Pack 上线并至少开启 1 个卡包

sbts.name: Pokémon 30th Anniversary
sbts.description: Commemorative SBT for participants in the Pokémon 30th Anniversary card pack launch on Renaiss.
sbts.descriptionZh: 纪念在 Renaiss 上参与宝可梦30周年纪念卡包上线的 SBT。
sbts.howToGet: Participate in the Pokémon 30th Anniversary pack launch
sbts.howToGetZh: 参与宝可梦30周年纪念卡包上线活动

sbts.name: Consensus HK 2026
sbts.description: Awarded to users who visited the Renaiss booth at Consensus Hong Kong 2026, where $15M+ in physical collectibles were showcased.
sbts.descriptionZh: 授予在 Consensus Hong Kong 2026 上访问 Renaiss 展位的用户，展示了价值超过 $15M 的实体收藏品。
sbts.howToGet: Visit the Renaiss booth at Consensus Hong Kong 2026
